Category.title: Category
Category.description: Represents a product category used for organizing products and dynamic navigation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the category, e.g., 'Dresses'.

slug.description: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the category, used for routing (e.g., 'dresses').

description.description: A brief description of the category.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the category was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the category was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product available for sale in the Divine.Co platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.

slug.description: A URL-friendly unique identifier for the product.

costPrice.description: The cost of obtaining the product (for internal profit tracking).

salesPrice.description: The selling price of the product displayed to customers.

flashSaleEndTime.description: The timestamp when a flash sale for this product ends, enabling a countdown timer.

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs for the main product images.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL for the primary thumbnail image of the product.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this product belongs to. (Relationship: Category 1:N Product)

tags.description: An array of descriptive tags for the product (e.g., 'Hot Sale', 'New Arrival').

isActive.description: Indicates whether the product is currently active and visible on the storefront.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated.

ProductVariant.title: ProductVariant
ProductVariant.description: Represents a specific variant of a product, such as a particular color or size, with its own stock and specific images.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ProductVariant entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product this variant belongs to. (Relationship: Product 1:N ProductVariant)

color.description: The color of the product variant.

size.description: The size of the product variant (e.g., 'S', 'M', 'L').

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit, a unique identifier for this specific product variant.

stockQuantity.description: The current quantity of this specific variant in stock.

variantSpecificImageUrls.description: An array of URLs for images specific to this variant (e.g., images showing the product in this color).

priceAdjustment.description: An optional numerical adjustment to the base product price for this specific variant.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the variant was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the variant was last updated.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents a customer of Divine.Co, used for order tracking and POS lookups.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Customer entity (could be linked to Firebase Auth User ID).

firstName.description: The first name of the customer.

lastName.description: The last name of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the customer, used for lookups in the POS system.

shippingAddress.description: The default shipping address for the customer.

billingAddress.description: The default billing address for the customer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's purchase, including details about the items, shipping, and payment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who placed the order. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Pre-order, Delivered, Cancelled).

totalAmount.description: The total amount of the order, including shipping and discounts.

subtotalAmount.description: The sum of prices of all items in the order before shipping or discounts.

shippingCost.description: The cost of shipping for this order.

discountAmount.description: The total discount applied to this order (from coupons, etc.).

couponCodeUsed.description: The code of the coupon used for this order, if any.

shippingAddress.description: The full shipping address for this specific order.

billingAddress.description: The full billing address for this specific order.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used for the order (e.g., 'Cash on Delivery').

isPaid.description: Indicates if the order has been paid. For COD, this might be true upon delivery.

deliveryRegion.description: The region for delivery (e.g., 'Inside Dhaka', 'Outside Dhaka').

notes.description: Optional notes related to the order, from customer or admin.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Details of a specific product variant purchased as part of an order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

orderId.description: Reference to the Order this item belongs to. (Relationship: Order 1:N OrderItem)

productId.description: Reference to the Product purchased. (Relationship: Product 1:N OrderItem)

productVariantId.description: Reference to the specific ProductVariant purchased. (Relationship: ProductVariant 1:N OrderItem)

quantity.description: The quantity of this product variant purchased.

unitPriceAtPurchase.description: The price of a single unit of the product variant at the time of purchase.

subtotal.description: The total price for this order item (quantity * unitPriceAtPurchase).

productSnapshotName.description: A snapshot of the product name at the time of purchase for historical record.

productSnapshotImage.description: A snapshot of the product's main image URL at the time of purchase for historical record.

variantSnapshotDetails.description: A JSON string storing key variant details (e.g., color, size) at the time of purchase.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order item was last updated.

Coupon.title: Coupon
Coupon.description: Represents a promotional coupon that can be applied to orders.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Coupon entity.

code.description: The unique code that users enter to apply the coupon.

type.description: The type of discount offered by the coupon ('fixed' amount or 'percentage').

value.description: The value of the discount (e.g., 20 for 20% off or 50 for $50 off).

minOrderAmount.description: The minimum order amount required for the coupon to be applicable.

maxUses.description: The maximum number of times this coupon can be used in total across all customers.

usesCount.description: The current number of times this coupon has been used.

expirationDate.description: The date and time when the coupon expires.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the coupon is currently active and usable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the coupon was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the coupon was last updated.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a customer review for a product, including rating and optional content and screenshots.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being reviewed. (Relationship: Product 1:N Review)

customerId.description: Reference to the Customer who submitted the review. (Relationship: Customer 1:N Review)

rating.description: The star rating given by the customer (e.g., 1 to 5).

comment.description: The textual comment provided by the customer.

screenshotUrls.description: An array of URLs for screenshots or images uploaded with the review.

reviewDate.description: The date and time when the review was submitted.

isApproved.description: Indicates whether the review has been approved by an administrator for public display.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the review was last updated.

HomepageBanner.title: HomepageBanner
HomepageBanner.description: Represents a banner displayed on the storefront homepage, often part of a slider.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HomepageBanner entity.

title.description: The title text displayed on the banner.

description.description: A short description or tagline for the banner.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the image displayed in the banner.

targetUrl.description: The URL where the banner links to when clicked.

displayOrder.description: A numerical value indicating the order in which banners should be displayed.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the banner is currently active and displayed on the homepage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the banner was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the banner was last updated.

definition.description: Stores product categories. Publicly readable for storefront navigation, Admin-only write access. Includes unique slug for routing.

params.name: categoryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the category.

definition.description: Stores product details. Publicly readable for storefront display, Admin-only write access. Includes `categoryId` for filtering and `flashSaleEndTime` for countdowns.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Stores specific product variants (e.g., color, size, stock). Publicly readable, Admin-only write access. Nested under `/products/{productId}`.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent product.

params.name: variantId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product variant.

definition.description: Stores customer profiles. Accessible by the customer (`request.auth.uid == customerId`) and administrators. The `id` field matches Firebase Auth `uid`.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the customer, corresponding to Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores customer orders. Includes denormalized `customerId` for authorization independence. Accessible by the owning customer and administrators for read/write. Supports inventory sync logic.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

definition.description: Stores individual items within an order. Nested under `/orders/{orderId}`. Includes denormalized `customerId` from the parent order for authorization independence.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent order.

params.name: orderItemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order item.

definition.description: Stores promotional coupons. Publicly readable for active coupons (for client-side validation), Admin-only write to manage details and usage counts (`usesCount`).

params.name: couponId
params.description: The unique identifier for the coupon.

definition.description: Stores customer reviews for products. Includes denormalized `productId` and `customerId` for efficient queries and authorization independence. Publicly readable only if `isApproved` is true. Customer can write their own reviews, Admin can read/write all.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the review.

definition.description: Stores homepage banner configurations. Publicly readable for storefront display, Admin-only write access.

params.name: bannerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the homepage banner.

definition.description: Dedicated collection for Database Access Control (DBAC). Existence of a document here (`roles_admin/{uid}`) grants administrative privileges. Read-only by the `userId` itself, Admin-only write access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of a user with administrator privileges.
